## Overview

HTML Deployer extracts AI generated HTML from ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini, then lets you download or publish it fast.

HTML Deployer is a tool that turns AI-generated HTML into a live website quickly and efficiently. Go from html to website in one streamlined workflow, with preview, ZIP export, and direct publishing from the same extension. Use HTML Deployer to upload HTML file to website targets like Netlify, GitHub, FTP hosting, or your own self hosted agent. ## KEY FEATURES ⚙️ ### Extract AI generated HTML from chat pages - Detect HTML code blocks on supported AI platforms such as ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini. - Extract AI generated HTML directly from the conversation so you do not need to copy code into a separate editor first. ### Preview before you publish - Preview the generated page before it goes live so you can review the result more confidently. - Check how the page looks in desktop, tablet, and mobile style formats before publishing. - Review layout, content, and visual structure faster before deployment. ### Download ZIP - Export the generated page as a ZIP package for local download or manual hosting upload. - Keep a portable version of the page for archiving, review, handoff, or uploading through your own process. Use the downloaded file when you want full control over where and how the page is published. ### Cloud publishing Publish to cloud targets such as Netlify and GitHub based workflows from one extension. Use this option when you want a faster path to a live URL without managing a traditional hosting panel. ### FTP deployment Deploy through FTP when you want to use your own hosting account or a client hosting environment. Use this option when you prefer direct control over existing hosting infrastructure. ### Self hosted publishing (Host Agent) Publish through a self hosted host agent when you want a direct path to your own server. Use this option when you want a self host workflow with more flexibility and control. ### Built for repeated page publishing - Keep deployment history so you can revisit recent pages and publishing activity. - Auto suggest a filename from the HTML title when available. - Open the live URL quickly after publishing and continue testing or sharing. ### Designed for fast AI to website workflows - Help users move from AI output to a public page without jumping across too many tools. - Reduce the manual steps of copying, saving, uploading, and checking the final URL. - Make html deployer workflows easier for marketers, founders, agencies, developers, and beginners. ## USE CASES 🎯 ### Developers HTML Deployer works well for developers who want a faster bridge from AI generated markup to a live page. It is useful for demos, internal previews, stakeholder reviews, and lightweight prototypes. ### Founders HTML Deployer gives founders a simpler path from AI output to a live website. It works well for testing ideas, launching waitlists, publishing product pages, and validating concepts without setting up a heavy workflow. ### Marketers HTML Deployer helps marketers turn AI generated HTML into campaign pages faster. It is useful for quick launches, landing pages for ads, lead generation pages, promotional pages, and fast experiments where speed and convenience matter. ### Agencies HTML Deployer is useful for agencies that need to move from AI generated HTML to a shareable URL with less friction. It supports faster review cycles and simpler publishing across multiple hosting styles. ### Beginners HTML Deployer is a practical option for people who can generate HTML with AI but do not want to learn every hosting tool before publishing a simple page. It makes the path from chat output to website easier to follow. ## HOW TO PUBLISH A WEBSITE WITH HTML 🔍 ### Set up your target - Step 1: Open the Settings area inside the extension. - Step 2: Add your preferred target configuration, such as Netlify, Vercel, GitHub, FTP, or your self hosted agent. - Step 3: Enter the required credentials or endpoint details for that target. - Step 4: Save the configuration and verify that it is ready to use. - Step 5: Return to the Deploy screen and publish the page when you are ready. ### Publish AI generated HTML - Step 1: Open ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini and generate a page in HTML. - Step 2: Let HTML Deployer detect the HTML code block on the page. - Step 3: Click the Deploy button and review the live preview and suggested filename. - Step 4: Choose whether you want to download the page as a ZIP or publish it directly. - Step 5: Select your target, such as Cloud, FTP, or Host Agent. - Step 6: Press Deploy to Host to publish, then open the final URL to verify the result. HTML Deployer also automatically creates a QR code so you can scan it and open the website instantly. ### Use the ZIP export workflow - Step 1: Generate or refine your HTML in a supported AI tool. - Step 2: Open HTML Deployer and confirm the preview looks correct. - Step 3: Choose the Download option to export a ZIP package. - Step 4: Save the ZIP file locally. - Step 5: Upload it manually to your preferred hosting environment if you do not want direct publishing. ## PERMISSIONS AND REQUIREMENTS 🔐 ### Permissions used by the extension - Storage permission is used to save your settings, configured targets, and deployment history. - Tabs and scripting related access are used so the extension can detect supported AI chat pages and interact with HTML code blocks where needed. - Network access is used to communicate with your chosen publish target, such as a cloud service, FTP relay flow, or self hosted endpoint. ### Requirements before use - You need a supported AI page that contains HTML you want to export or publish. - You need at least one configured publish target if you want direct deployment. - You can also use the download workflow if you prefer to host the page manually. ### Practical notes - Final results can depend on your selected hosting target, your page assets, and your own configuration. - You should always review the live page after publishing, especially if the HTML contains forms, scripts, tracking code, or external files. ## WHY THIS EXTENSION 🚀 ### Built for the real problem after AI generates code AI tools can write HTML quickly, but publishing that HTML is still manual for many users. HTML Deployer focuses on the part of the workflow that usually wastes time after the code is already ready. It helps you extract AI generated HTML, preview it, package it, and publish it from one place. ### Flexible for different hosting styles - Some users want cloud publishing. - Some users want FTP for client hosting. - Some users want a self hosted route with more control. - Some users only want a ZIP file so they can handle hosting themselves. HTML Deployer supports these different ways of working without forcing one rigid path. ### More than a simple uploader HTML Deployer is not just a button that pushes files somewhere. It is an AI HTML export and publishing workflow that starts directly on ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini. The extension gives users a clearer path from AI output to a shareable website. ### Useful for fast iteration When you test pages often, even small manual steps become expensive. HTML Deployer reduces that repeated friction and helps you publish, review, revise, and publish again faster. This makes it especially useful for landing page workflows, client feedback cycles, and quick experiments. ### High privacy and security - HTML Deployer is designed so your settings, configured targets, and local workflow data stay on your own machine inside the extension environment instead of being managed through a separate external dashboard. - Your HTML is only exported or sent out when you choose to download or publish it to a target that you configure yourself. - The extension is built to keep the process direct and controlled, so users can move from AI output to website publishing without unnecessary data exposure across extra tools. ## FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS ❓ ### Is HTML Deployer free to use HTML Deployer includes a free way to get started, and the exact limits or premium features may depend on the current product plan. The best approach is to check the official links for the latest pricing, usage limits, and target availability before relying on a specific workflow for production use. ### What does HTML Deployer actually do HTML Deployer is an html deployer that extracts AI generated HTML from supported chat platforms, previews it, lets you download it as a ZIP, and helps you publish it to configured targets. Instead of jumping between multiple tools after the AI has finished generating the page, you can complete most of the workflow inside one extension. ### Is HTML Deployer a website builder No. HTML Deployer is not a full website builder. It is built for the stage after the HTML already exists. If ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, or another tool has already created the HTML, HTML Deployer helps you move that output toward a live website or a downloadable package more quickly. ### Can I use it without advanced coding knowledge Yes. HTML Deployer is designed to reduce technical friction for people who can generate HTML with AI but do not want a complicated publishing process. You still need a basic understanding of where you want to host the page, but the extension makes the path from AI output to published result much easier to follow. ### Can I use my own hosting Yes. HTML Deployer supports workflows for your own hosting through FTP based publishing or a self hosted agent. This means you are not forced into a single hosted platform and can keep more control over where the final page lives. ### Can I export without publishing right away Yes. One of the core benefits of HTML Deployer is that it can export AI generated HTML as a ZIP package. This is useful when you want to archive the page, hand it off to someone else, upload it manually, or review it before making it public. ### Which AI platforms does it work with HTML Deployer is designed for supported HTML workflows on ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini. ## IMPORTANT LINKS 📌 - Official website: https://backrun.co/html-deployer - Support page: https://backrun.co/htmldeployer/contact.php - Setup guide: https://backrun.co/htmldeployer/help.html - Contact email: hi@backrun.co ## CHANGELOG 🔄 Version 1.0.0 (Initial Chrome Web Store release) - Extract AI generated HTML from supported chat based AI tools. - Preview pages before export or publishing. - Export pages as ZIP packages for manual use. - Publish to configured cloud, FTP, and self hosted targets. - Save recent history for faster repeat workflows. ## DISCLAIMER - ChatGPT is a trademark or registered trademark of OpenAI. - Claude is a trademark or registered trademark of Anthropic. - Gemini is a trademark or registered trademark of Google. - Netlify, Vercel and GitHub are trademarks or registered trademarks of their respective owners. HTML Deployer is an independent product and is not endorsed by, sponsored by, officially affiliated with, or operated by any of the companies above. Any mention of third party platforms is for descriptive and compatibility purposes only. This product does not imply an affiliate relationship with any third party platform unless that relationship is explicitly stated on the official website.
